code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """Convert a list of airport‑related triples into a readable sentence."""
    if not triples:
        return ""
    # Simple template mapping for common predicates
    # Full‑sentence templates for the first (main) clause
    main_templates = {
        "cityServed": "{subject} serves {object}",
        "location": "{subject} is located in {object}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": "{subject} lies {object} meters above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": "{subject} lies {object} feet above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": "{subject} lies {object} metres above sea level",
        "operatingOrganisation": "{subject} is operated by {object}",
        "runwayLength": "{subject} has a runway length of {object} metres",
        "runwayName": "{subject} has runway {object}",
        "country": "{subject} is in {object}",
        "isPartOf": "{subject} is part of {object}",
        "1stRunwayLengthFeet": "{subject} has a first runway {object} feet long",
        "1stRunwayLengthMetre": "{subject} has a first runway {object} metres long",
        "1stRunwayNumber": "{subject} has runway number {object}",
        "runwaySurfaceType": "{subject} runway surface is {object}",
    }
    # Short‑phrase templates for subsequent clauses (omit repeated subject)
    suffix_templates = {
        "cityServed": "serves {object}",
        "location": "located in {object}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": "lying {object} meters above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": "lying {object} feet above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": "lying {object} metres above sea level",
        "operatingOrganisation": "operated by {object}",
        "runwayLength": "has a runway length of {object} metres",
        "runwayName": "has runway {object}",
        "country": "is in {object}",
        "isPartOf": "is part of {object}",
        "1stRunwayLengthFeet": "has a first runway {object} feet long",
        "1stRunwayLengthMetre": "has a first runway {object} metres long",
        "1stRunwayNumber": "has runway number {object}",
        "runwaySurfaceType": "runway surface is {object}",
    }
    phrases = []
    for idx, t in enumerate(triples):
        if idx == 0:
            tmpl = main_templates.get(t.predicate)
            if tmpl:
                phrase = tmpl.format(subject=t.subject, object=t.object)
            else:
                phrase = f"{t.subject} {t.predicate} {t.object}"
        else:
            tmpl = suffix_templates.get(t.predicate)
            if tmpl:
                phrase = tmpl.format(object=t.object)
            else:
                phrase = f"{t.predicate.replace('_', ' ')} {t.object}"
        phrases.append(phrase)
    # Assemble a single fluent sentence
    if len(phrases) == 1:
        return phrases[0] + "."
    return ", ".join(phrases[:-1]) + ", and " + phrases[-1] + "."

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
